km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Luvetot於1278年出生在英國時，他的父親William de Lovetot, Lord  Worksop26歲，母親Mrs William de Lovetot24歲。他和Mrs Richard de Luvetot至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Luvetot于1278年出生在英国时，他的父亲William de Lovetot, Lord  Worksop26岁，母亲Mrs William de Lovetot24岁。他和Mrs Richard de Luvetot至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Luvetot was born in 1278, in England, his father, William de Lovetot, Lord  Worksop, was 26 and his mother, Mrs William de Lovetot, was 24. He had at least 1 son with Mrs Richard de Luvetot.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Luvetot est né en 1278, à Angleterre, son père, William de Lovetot, Lord  Worksop, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs William de Lovetot, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs Richard de Luvetot.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Luvetot 1278 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Lovetot, Lord  Worksop 26 und seine Mutter Mrs William de Lovetot 24. Er hatte mit Mrs Richard de Luvetot mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Luvetot è nato il nel 1278 nel England, il suo padre, William de Lovetot, Lord  Worksop, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Mrs William de Lovetot, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs Richard de Luvetot.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Luvetotが1278年にイギリスで生まれた時，父William de Lovetot, Lord  Worksopは26歳，母Mrs William de Lovetotは24歳であった。彼はMrs Richard de Luvetotとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Luvetot(이)가 1278년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Lovetot, Lord  Worksop(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs William de Lovetot(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Mrs Richard de Luvetot(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Luvetot nasceu em 1278, em Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Lovetot, Lord  Worksop, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mrs William de Lovetot, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs Richard de Luvetot.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Luvetot родился в 1278 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени William de Lovetot, Lord  Worksop было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs William de Lovetot, 24. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs Richard de Luvetot.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Luvetot nació en 1278, en Inglaterra, su papá, William de Lovetot, Lord  Worksop, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mrs William de Lovetot, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs Richard de Luvetot.
